# dsa

```go
import "crypto/dsa"
```

Package dsa implements the Digital Signature Algorithm, as defined in FIPS 186\-3.

The DSA operations in this package are not implemented using constant\-time algorithms.

Deprecated: DSA is a legacy algorithm, and modern alternatives such as Ed25519 \(implemented by package crypto/ed25519\) should be used instead. Keys with 1024\-bit moduli \(L1024N160 parameters\) are cryptographically weak, while bigger keys are not widely supported. Note that FIPS 186\-5 no longer approves DSA for signature generation.

## Variables

<a name="ErrInvalidPublicKey"></a>ErrInvalidPublicKey results when a public key is not usable by this code. FIPS is quite strict about the format of DSA keys, but other code may be less so. Thus, when using keys which may have been generated by other code, this error must be handled.

```go
var ErrInvalidPublicKey = errors.New("crypto/dsa: invalid public key")
```

<a name="GenerateKey"></a>

## func [GenerateKey](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L164>)

```go
func GenerateKey(priv *PrivateKey, rand io.Reader) error
```

GenerateKey generates a public&private key pair. The Parameters of the [PrivateKey](<#PrivateKey>) must already be valid \(see [GenerateParameters](<#GenerateParameters>)\).

<a name="GenerateParameters"></a>

## func [GenerateParameters](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L66>)

```go
func GenerateParameters(params *Parameters, rand io.Reader, sizes ParameterSizes) error
```

GenerateParameters puts a random, valid set of DSA parameters into params. This function can take many seconds, even on fast machines.

<a name="Sign"></a>

## func [Sign](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L218>)

```go
func Sign(random io.Reader, priv *PrivateKey, hash []byte) (r, s *big.Int, err error)
```

Sign signs an arbitrary length hash \(which should be the result of hashing a larger message\) using the private key, priv. It returns the signature as a pair of integers. The security of the private key depends on the entropy of rand.

Note that FIPS 186\-3 section 4.6 specifies that the hash should be truncated to the byte\-length of the subgroup. This function does not perform that truncation itself.

Since Go 1.26, a secure source of random bytes is always used, and the Reader is ignored unless GODEBUG=cryptocustomrand=1 is set. This setting will be removed in a future Go release. Instead, use [testing/cryptotest.SetGlobalRandom](<https://pkg.go.dev/testing/cryptotest/#SetGlobalRandom>).

Be aware that calling Sign with an attacker\-controlled [PrivateKey](<#PrivateKey>) may require an arbitrary amount of CPU.

<a name="Verify"></a>

## func [Verify](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L290>)

```go
func Verify(pub *PublicKey, hash []byte, r, s *big.Int) bool
```

Verify verifies the signature in r, s of hash using the public key, pub. It reports whether the signature is valid.

Note that FIPS 186\-3 section 4.6 specifies that the hash should be truncated to the byte\-length of the subgroup. This function does not perform that truncation itself.

<a name="ParameterSizes"></a>

## type [ParameterSizes](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L51>)

ParameterSizes is an enumeration of the acceptable bit lengths of the primes in a set of DSA parameters. See FIPS 186\-3, section 4.2.

```go
type ParameterSizes int
```

<a name="L1024N160"></a>

```go
const (
    L1024N160 ParameterSizes = iota
    L2048N224
    L2048N256
    L3072N256
)
```

<a name="Parameters"></a>

## type [Parameters](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L27-L29>)

Parameters represents the domain parameters for a key. These parameters can be shared across many keys. The bit length of Q must be a multiple of 8.

```go
type Parameters struct {
    P, Q, G *big.Int
}
```

<a name="PrivateKey"></a>

## type [PrivateKey](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L38-L41>)

PrivateKey represents a DSA private key.

```go
type PrivateKey struct {
    PublicKey
    X   *big.Int
}
```

<a name="PublicKey"></a>

## type [PublicKey](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/crypto/dsa/dsa.go#L32-L35>)

PublicKey represents a DSA public key.

```go
type PublicKey struct {
    Parameters
    Y   *big.Int
}
```
